summary: A NATO eastern flank state and EU member bordering Ukraine and the Black Sea, historically trapped between great power spheres — now a growing economy and key location for US and NATO military assets.

history.detail: Gained Transylvania from Hungary; doubled in size.
Initially with Axis; switches to Allied side 1944 after Soviet pressure.
Ceaușescu executed on Christmas Day; most violent Eastern European transition.

finance.currency_role: Romanian Leu (RON); EU member outside eurozone

resources.oil_gas: Black Sea offshore gas (Neptune Deep — major discovery)
resources.water: Danube Delta — largest wetland in Europe

follow_the_money.detail: Growing tech export sector; UiPath most prominent product

connections.detail: Deveselu missile defence base; growing troop presence
Black Sea flashpoint; NATO eastern flank front
Border state; grain transit and refugee support
